SEC approves Bitwise crypto index ETF with BTC, ETH, XRP, and Solana
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission has approved Bitwises request to convert its 10 Crypto Index Fund into a fully-fledged ETF, allowing investors to gain exposure to a diversified basket of digital assets including Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and Solana. According to the filing, the ETF will also include Cardano, Sui, Chainlink, Avalanche, Litecoin, and Polkadot. articles.title: Are Cardano payments coming to Apple Pay?
articles.description: Excitement around Cardano’s (ADA) apparent integration with Apple Pay has taken over social media this week, following viral posts suggesting that ADA payments are now live across Apple devices. However, according to Tokeo co-founder Shaz, the truth is slightly more nuanced. In a post shared on July 22, Shaz addressed the viral headlines circulating around CardanoKit, a development toolkit that enables Cardano functionality on Apple devices. Ethereum network raises block gas limit to 45 Million units in 25% jump
articles.description: 22-7-2025 – Ethereum validators have implemented a 25% increase to the network’s block gas limit, raising the threshold from 36 million to 45 million units at block number 22,968,004, enhancing the blockchain’s transaction processing capacity. articles.description: Ethereum’s derivatives market has erupted in the past seven days, and the trading desk at Singapore-based QCP Capital argues it is the clearest evidence yet that a long-anticipated altcoin season is finally under way.
